repos.name: T3MP3ST

repos.readme_snippet:
🌩️ T3MP3ST
A multi-agent offensive-security framework, built to turn the AI coding agent you already run into a zero-day hunter.
!scores: re-derivable   !verify-claims 24/24   !PRs welcome   !License: AGPL-3.0
Point T3MP3ST at an authorized target and the kill chain is yours — recon

repos.name: ios-location-spoofer
repos.description: Standalone iOS app to spoof GPS location without jailbreak. Includes Shadowrocket/Surge/Loon/QX/Stash module.
repos.readme_snippet:
iOS Location Spoofer
用代理软件的 HTTPS 解密功能，把 Apple 地图定位骗到世界任何角落。
> 📖 新手直接看这篇 → 小白保姆级图文教程（一步步教你安装、配置、生效，含常见问题排查）
参考项目
本项目基于 acheong08/ios-location-spoofer 的核心研究。原始项目是用 Go 写的独立 iOS App，通过自建 VPN + MITM 代理实现定位欺骗。
本仓库将其核心逻辑移植为 JavaScript，适配到 Shadowrocket / Surge / Loon / Quantumult X / Stash 五个代理平台，免编译、免开发者

repos.name: claude-real-video
repos.description: Let Claude (or any LLM) actually watch a video — scene-aware, deduplicated frames + transcript, from a URL or local file. Runs locally, MIT.
repos.readme_snippet:
claude-real-video
   
Let Claude — or any LLM — actually watch a video.
!demo
> Same 58-second clip: fixed 1 fps sampling = 58 frames. crv keeps the 26 that actually differ — and --grid packs them into 3 contact sheets. Fewer tokens, nothing missed.
> This free version lets your AI *see* the video.

repos.name: investing-for-beginners
repos.description: 小隐寺投资百科���方公开索引：美股、期权与加密货币知识框架
repos.readme_snippet:
投资入门指南
!Version
作者：徐冲浪
这是一份面向中文投资者的公开投资入门指南，适合想从零开始了解美股、期权和加密货币，却不知道应该先学什么、怎样建立完整知识框架的人。
指南不要求读者具备金融专业背景。内容从交易时间、订单类型、财务报表和基础估值讲起，再逐步延伸到期权定价、仓位管理、钱包安全、链上交易与常见骗局，帮助初学者看懂投资过程中真正会遇到的术语和操作问题。
你可以使用本指南：
- 建立美股投资的基础框架，理解股票、ETF、财报、估值和市场风险；
- 学习下单前需要检查的价格、流动性、交易成本与退出条件；
- 认识期权的收益结构、时间损耗、波动率和最大亏损；
- 了解加密货币交易

repos.name: token-diet
repos.description: Always-on token-efficiency skill for coding agents (Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Windsurf, Cline). ~31% lower bill on average, no loss of correctness.
repos.readme_snippet:
token-diet
Always-on token-efficiency skill for coding agents — **Claude Code, Codex, Cursor,
Windsurf, Cline**. Trims tokens across the whole session (replies, docs, tests,
code, context, tool use) without losing correctness. ≈31% lower bill on average
(−17% to −54% by session type) and −30% to −81
